hero.title: Gelato artigianale. Handcrafted with heart
hero.subtitle: At Bongusto, we believe in real Italian gelato. Freshly made every day with natural ingredients and a deep love for our craft.

about_teaser.title: Our Story
about_teaser.text: For generations, our family has been united by a passion for authentic Italian gelato. Every scoop tells a story. Find out what makes Bongusto so special.

about_page.title: About
about_page.subtitle: The story behind Bongusto
about_page.text1: Bongusto stands for real Italian gelato. Made with natural ingredients and a lot of passion. For generations, our family has combined a love of craftsmanship with the knowledge of traditional recipes.
about_page.text2: At our locations in Abtwil and Rorschach, we offer a wide selection of classic and creative flavors. Many of them vegan and lactose free.

catering_page.title: Catering
catering_page.subtitle: Gelato for your special occasion
catering_page.text: Wedding, birthday, or corporate event. We bring the Bongusto experience to you. Get in touch and we'll put together a custom offer just for you.

gallery_page.title: Gallery
gallery_page.subtitle: A glimpse into the world of Bongusto

configurator.title: Gelato Esagerato
configurator.subtitle: Create your perfect gelato in just a few steps
configurator.container_note: Bongusto Cup required. Bring your own or buy a new one (CHF 4.-).
configurator.step_size_desc: 0.5L, 0.75L or 1L. You decide how big your gelato will be.
configurator.step_flavors_desc: Stracciatella, Pistachio, Mango and more. Mix your favorite flavors together.
configurator.step_toppings_desc: Snickers, Brownies, Ovomaltine Crunchy and more. The topping makes the difference.
configurator.container_choice_desc: Bring your own Bongusto Cup or buy a new one. Our Cups are sturdy, reusable and last forever.
configurator.own_container_desc: I'll bring my own Bongusto Cup.
configurator.new_container_desc: I'll buy a new Bongusto Cup. Sturdy and reusable.
